name: I hurt my back lifting at work but symptoms got worse days later - still eligible?
description: Yes with medical proof of link.[4]

mainEntity.name: I hurt my back lifting at work but symptoms got worse days later - still eligible?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes with medical proof of link.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah recognizes delayed onset if linked to accident via medical evidence.[4] File within one year of disability. Key factors: (1) Causal connection required; (2) Doctor opinion key; (3) Pre-existing ok if aggravated; (4) Prompt reporting helps. See doctor ASAP, document timeline. Lawyer strengthens delayed claims.
